title: lagochilus seravschanicus subsp. schugnanicus
intro: Lagochilus seravschanicus subsp. schugnanicus is a subspecies of plant in the bignonia family, Lagochilus, known for its medicinal properties. It is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. The plant is rich in glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. Lagochilus seravschanicus subsp. schugnanicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory conditions.
